text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O has been feeling tired, so I take her
to the infirmary for some rest.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even the Overlord must refrain from overwork.
Until we meet again, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? What in the world is going on here?

text_block_list.name: Commoner A
text_block_list.text:
The Brilliant Nation of Opera O is most worthy of
the multitalented mastermind that is Lady Opera
O!

text_block_list.name: Commoner B
text_block_list.text:
No! The noble, majestic Lady Opera O should
come to the Opera O Grand Nation!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What is happening here? Two nations at war over
me?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Stop this at once! Pointless conflicts bring nothing
but sorrow.

text_block_list.name: The Masses
text_block_list.text: Lady Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yearn for me all you wish, but I will only ever be
mine. Even the Three Goddesses are powerless to
change that!

text_block_list.name: The Masses
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are we to do?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well! Do not lose heart, unnamed followers
of my cause.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As an apology... please soothe your wounded
hearts by basking in my beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes on... MY BRILLIANCE!

text_block_list.name: Commoner A
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Its shimmer stretches as far as the eye can
see!

text_block_list.name: Commoner B
text_block_list.text:
This magnificent light! I must peer into it longer,
even if for just one more second!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now do you understand? There are better things
to do than hate and bicker.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Namely, praising this marvelous work of
art—granted unto you by the gods above—that is
I, T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Go on, shower me with adoring admiration!
Haaah ha ha... Huh?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A dream? Heh, yet another legend of the
Overlord has been born.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O wakes up in an amazing mood,
completely back to her usual self!

text_block_list.name: The Masses
text_block_list.text: Aaargh! M-my eyes! I-I can't see anything!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas! Is my brilliance too blinding for them to
behold?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, one and all! You must endure! Everyone!
Every—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah! A dream, it was!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, those poor souls... And all because of my
overwhelming beauty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems T.M. Opera O feels too guilty to focus on
her recovery.
